title: crepidomanes majoriae
side_effects: Crepidomanes majoriae can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high levels of saponins and glycosides. In some cases, excessive consumption may lead to allergic reactions, manifesting as skin rashes and respiratory problems. Additionally, the plant's high levels of alkaloids can cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations, if used in large quantities. Improper use may also lead to interactions with other medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions.
